final_prompt.prompt:
Create a panoramic scene of a Tang Dynasty Lantern Festival in Chang'an, with thousands of lanterns illuminating the night sky.

Style/medium: needs a "工笔重彩" (meticulous heavy-color) long scroll aesthetic — exact brushwork density and pigment saturation are yours
Composition: must be a panoramic long scroll format capturing the full cityscape
Subject: must include thousands of lanterns illuminating the night sky over Tang Dynasty Chang'an
Scene/backdrop: must be Tang Dynasty Chang'an city at night during Lantern Festival
Lighting/mood: needs a festive lantern-lit night atmosphere — exact light distribution is yours
Color palette: needs a rich, saturated direction — exact pigment choices are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve the long scroll (长卷) format structure
Avoid:
